title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr John Philip Smith
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr John Philip Smith  Teacher reference number: 3448249  Teacher’s date of birth: 14 May 1986  Location teacher worked: Ashby-de-la-Zouch, East Midlands  Date of professional conduct panel: 12 to 15 March 2024, 19 August 2024 and 3 February 2025  Outcome type: Prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr John Philip Smith formerly employed in Ashby-de-la-Zouch, East Midlands.   Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
